name: Chocolate-Glazed Baileys Irish Cream Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Plus 2 tablespoons Baileys Irish Cream Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Finely grind graham crackers in a food processor. Add melted butter and blend until combined. Press the crust mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch-diameter spring form pan. Bake the crust for about 8 minutes, then transfer it to a rack. Maintain the oven temperature.
For Filling: Using an electric mixer, beat cream cheese and sugar in a large bowl until smooth. Beat in flour. Add eggs one at a time, beating just until combined. Mix in the remaining ingredients. Pour the filling into the crust. Bake for 10 minutes, then reduce the oven temperature to 250°F. Bake for about 40 minutes longer. Cool the cake on a rack for 10 minutes. Chill overnight.
For Glaze: Bring cream to a simmer in a heavy medium saucepan. Reduce heat to low and add chopped chocolate, stirring until melted and smooth. Allow the glaze to cool to lukewarm. Pour the glaze over the cake after releasing it from the pan. Refrigerate until the glaze sets, about 30 minutes.
